brandfetch.note: Brandfetch palette corroborates the curated charter. Curated values are authoritative unless 'applied' records a change. Auto-extracted BF colors are the dominant-pixel view and are NOT used to overwrite a curated identity except on a high-confidence claimed profile.

validation.method: website CSS (:root vars / computed styles) + brand-guideline PDF search, via parallel research subagents
validation.bf_reliability: low — BF returned #69727d (scraped gray) as primary and swapped primary/accent; site CSS names #272674 'blue-primary'

resolutions.evidence: --wp--preset--color--blue-primary: #272674; used for every CTA/heading/icon. BF #69727d absent from site.
--wp--preset--color--digital-blue: #4182ff. BF labelled #272674 (the primary) as accent — roles swapped.
schema.org + hero copy: '7,600 people across 5 continents'. BF band 5,001-10,000 consistent but coarser.
